title: Compact view (sooo much white space)
excerpt: There is so much white space in Monday.com. Our team does not find any of the dashboard widgets very useful because they require scrolling to see almost anything. There needs to be a “compact” or “slim” view option if Mo…

posts.author: jescho (Jess Chodor)
posts.cookedHtml: There is so much white space in Monday.com. Our team does not find any of the dashboard widgets very useful because they require scrolling to see almost anything. There needs to be a “compact” or “slim” view option if Monday wants to keep its spaced out formatting. Maybe a profile or account setting? This is a major issue for our org.

posts.author: david889 (David Bland)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,
I appreciate your feedback regarding s dashboard widgets! Having a “compact” or “slim” view option would indeed be helpful for users who prefer a more condensed layout. While I don’t have direct control over ’s features, I recommend sharing your suggestion directly with their support or product team. They might consider implementing such an option to enhance the user experience.
Best Regards
david889

posts.author: Hattie (Harriet L)
posts.cookedHtml: On the table view especially, if you connect multiple boards, there’s so much wasted space - the table view should be similar to the ‘my work’ section in terms of space. The table view is so bulky, there is no need for board and group headers and instead should be breadcrumbs which take up less space.

posts.author: mondayuser345 (mondayuser345)
posts.cookedHtml:
This needs to be implemented. We need to be able to combine the tables within this widget, and instead of splitting each table within the widget, it appears as one table.

Maybe a small color visual indicator can be added as a column or beside each item so it can be distinguished which table the item belongs to

But yes the current table widget layout wastes a lot of space and it should be combined better
